value_alignment.note: Prioritizes relationships/social reassurance (g1/g6) while also stressing health via reset and sleep-risk; academic work is present but often justified mainly as reputation/less panic.

communication_style.note: Uses short, direct, accommodating messages with firm check-in windows and deflection lines, consistent with an extroverted but non-confrontational style.

decision_tendencies.note: Generally short-horizon and risk-moderate with boundary pre-planning, but actions repeatedly oscillate between work and reset and sometimes conflict with sleep discipline (energy/stress used to justify churn).

goal_coherence.note: Goals evolve plausibly turn-to-turn: social updates recur with concrete windows, while work blocks sequence around Assignment A/quiz prep and resets without sudden personality shifts.

weakness_expression.note: The trajectory shows some boundary-setting and resets, but it still largely avoids the hallmark weakness of underweighting personal plans/wasting full-join time—planning and guardrails are unusually effective.

overall.summary: Strong match on relationship-weighted, accommodating communication and coherent short-horizon goal evolution; partial alignment on health/sleep-risk behaviors, and weaker evidence of the persona’s known time-wasting weakness (guardrails are consistently applied).
